heroFact: Most people start feeling relief within 1–2 days of starting antibiotics for a UTI — but finishing the full course matters even after symptoms improve.

timeline.label: Symptoms may still feel the same as antibiotics begin working
Many people notice reduced pain and urgency
Most symptoms should be significantly improved
Completing every prescribed dose is essential even after feeling better
timeline.note: Stopping early increases the risk of the infection returning or antibiotic resistance.
